plain_english: Two conflicting Zero Trading setups are both live: a strong recent call (12 June, grade 8) says buy here at 12.9–13.2 targeting 14–17; an older call (14 May, grade 6) says short only at 10.2 if price drops there, with hard stop at 14.4. Price is at 12.95 right now, trapped between these two scenarios. Do not enter either until price either breaks above 14.4 (proving the bull case) or reverses below 12.26 (invalidating both). Wait for clarity.
